title: The Camelia Transition: A Phonetic Analysis of 'Raku' vs. 'Perl'
abstract: An empirical study on the reduction of mouth-strain when moving from a liquid 'l' in 'Perl' to the punchy, k-centric satisfaction of 'Raku'.

title: Rakudo: The Way of the Camel-less
note: A deep dive into the Japanese etymology of 'Rakudo' (The Way of Raku) and why implementations should sound like martial arts.

title: Wait, what's it called now? A Longitudinal Study of Developer Confusion
abstract: Investigates the cognitive load required for veteran developers to stop typing 'p6' and start embracing the 'raku' CLI alias.
